paths._comment: Relative to config.json location. dataset_dir: raw MY_SWAMP .npz output, processed_dir: normalized tensors, model_dir: checkpoints.

solver._comment: MY_SWAMP solver settings. M: spectral truncation (42/63/106). dt_seconds: time step [s]. default_time_days: simulation length [days]. starttime_index: skip first N outputs for IC stability.

geometry._comment: Reorder output to match torch-harmonics convention: latitude N->S, longitude [0, 2pi).

sampling._comment: Parameter sampling for dataset generation. generation_workers: 0=auto (GPU backend -> threaded generation), >=1 forces worker count. Required parameter names: a_m, omega_rad_s, Phibar, DPhieq, g_m_s2, K6, K6Phi, plus exactly one of taurad_s|taurad_hours and exactly one of taudrag_s|taudrag_hours.

_dist_options.loguniform: keys: min, max (finite, > 0, min < max), sampled in log10 space
_dist_options.mixture_off_loguniform: keys: p_off, off_value, on_min, on_max (0 <= p_off <= 1, on_min/on_max > 0, on_min < on_max)

sampling._example: To sweep a parameter, change dist from fixed to uniform/loguniform and provide required keys for that dist.

parameters._comment: Radiative relaxation timescale [hours] - VARIED, converted to seconds internally
parameters.name: taurad_hours

parameters._comment: Drag timescale [hours] - VARIED, converted to seconds internally
parameters.name: taudrag_hours

normalization._comment: Pre-training normalization. Phi spans ~1e5 so use log10. eta/delta are small signed quantities so use signed_log1p. U/V are moderate velocity fields, no transform needed. Params get z-score normalization.

model._comment: SFNO architecture. embed_dim/num_layers control capacity. rollout_steps_at_default_time: autoregressive steps at default_time_days. ic: MLP that maps Extended-9 params to initial condition on the sphere.

ic._comment: ParamICBasisMLP: maps Extended-9 params to [C, H, W] initial condition. basis: spatial basis functions. rand_basis: random spherical harmonic modes for expressivity.

training._comment: Training hyperparameters. device: auto tries GPU first, falls back to CPU. amp_mode: none|bf16|fp16. val_fraction: held-out validation split. scheduler: LR schedule (plateau|none).
